# ALCM\_interactivity 

## Contributors

* Viktor Spadi, Alchemisten AG

## Status

Draft - Will be supported by our [three.js](https://threejs.org) based [content viewer](#). The extension loader will be tied to the [Three.js glTF Loader](https://threejs.org/docs/#examples/en/loaders/GLTFLoader)

## Dependencies

Written against the glTF 2.0 spec.
